assessor_raw: BiLSTM vs logistic regression for course failure prediction. Design correctly implements temporal split by term, restricts prediction window to week 4, fits all preprocessing on training data, and provides equivalent tuning. The bidirectional LSTM is valid as all 28-day data is available at prediction time. Sensitivity checks at week 2 and 3 provide leakage detection. Verdict: defense_wins.
adjudication_raw: BiLSTM vs logistic regression for course failure prediction. Design correctly implements temporal split by term, restricts prediction window to week 4, fits all preprocessing on training data, and provides equivalent tuning. The bidirectional LSTM is valid as all 28-day data is available at prediction time. Sensitivity checks at week 2 and 3 provide leakage detection. Verdict: defense_wins.
